_doc: === ENTITY: A person, place, thing, organization, or concept ===
_id: OPTIONAL. UUIDv7 preferred (time-ordered). Auto-generated on import if null/missing.
_entity_type: REQUIRED. One of: Actor, Location, Artifact, Concept, Organization.

properties.name: Alexei Volkov
properties._name: REQUIRED in properties. Display name used for entity resolution.
properties.description: Tenured professor of political science with connections to intelligence circles

_properties: REQUIRED. Arbitrary JSON object. Must contain at least 'name'. Add any fields relevant to the entity.
_beliefs: OPTIONAL. JSON object representing the entity's belief state, worldview, or mental model.
_embedding: OPTIONAL. Dense float vector for semantic search. Usually null in archives (stored in embeddings/ layer).
_maturity: OPTIONAL (default: Candidate). One of: Candidate (LLM-extracted), Reviewed (human-checked), Validated (multi-source confirmed), GroundTruth (authoritative).
_confidence: OPTIONAL (default: 1.0). Float 0.0-1.0. How certain we are this entity is correctly identified.
_confidence_breakdown: OPTIONAL. Decomposed confidence: extraction (LLM quality), source_credibility (trust-weighted), corroboration (independent agreement), recency (time decay). Composite = 0.2*extraction + 0.35*source + 0.35*corroboration + 0.1*recency.
_provenance: OPTIONAL. Array of source references tracing where this entity was found.
_extraction_method: OPTIONAL (default: StructuredImport). One of: LlmParsed, HumanEntered, StructuredImport, Sensor.
_narrative_id: OPTIONAL. Overridden on import to match the target narrative slug.
_timestamps: OPTIONAL. Auto-filled on import if missing.
_deleted_at: OPTIONAL. ISO 8601 datetime for soft-delete. null = active.

properties.name: Harbor District
properties.description: Commercial port area with warehouses and shipping offices
